-fno-threadsafe-statics -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/home/obsid/Documents/2026Nrobo/src/2026_Main_BackUP/STM32F446XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs
